nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: Malayan whistling thrush
nodes.summary: Malayan whistling thrush（Malayan whistling thrush，学名 Myophonus robinsoni），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、污染、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is montane forests

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Malay Peninsula. Due primarily to habitat loss, its population is thought to be in decline.{{efn-ua|"This species qualifies as Vulnerable because development proposals threaten to reduce and fragment its upland forest habitat which would result in a rapid population decline in the near future

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species has areas of undisturbed habitat, but may be threatened by habitat destruction and degradation caused by conversion of forest to agricultural land, water pollution, invasive species and overdevelopment. Because the species may have a small range and a small population, the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species has listed it as near threatened

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species has areas of undisturbed habitat, but may be threatened by habitat destruction and degradation caused by conversion of forest to agricultural land, water pollution, invasive species and overdevelopment.
